title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at ET Money Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at ET Money Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money Ventures Solutions:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money Ventures Solutions!
